name: flag_red_flags
description: Run the red-flag detection pipeline on a specific listing. Checks: price vs BIR zonal value, developer complaint history, broker verification status, title type anomalies, photo reuse across other listings, and flood/fault zone proximity. Returns a list of flags with severity (info, caution, warning, critical) and explanatory messages. Always call this during a property deep dive.

listing_id.description: UUID of the listing to audit.

include_photo_check.description: Whether to run perceptual hash deduplication against other listings to detect photo reuse (a common fraud signal). Adds ~200 ms.
